untranslatable_reason: Earnings surprise detection (actual vs. consensus deviation > 2.5%) requires fundamental data input not available in price/technical indicators. This signal requires an earnings surprise event flag or fundamental data feed external to the allowed indicator set.
translation_notes: Translated price and volume conditions using allowed indicators. Used 'returns' (decimal scale) to express the 0.75% minimum daily gain. Used 'vol_ratio_20' (volume vs 20-day average) to approximate the 120% volume threshold. Used 'rsi_14' for momentum confirmation. The critical earnings surprise component cannot be expressed with available indicators and requires external data integration or a pre-computed earnings surprise flag in the data pipeline.
